reviews.comment:
Calculo las paradas para incluir este sitio en mi carga de combustible. Al entrar o salir de la ruta al desierto, es el mejor lugar para parar y descansar, está al costado de la ruta, y al lado del río. Tiene un shop completo, baños impecables, atención amable, lindo lugar, buen combustible.

(Translated by Google)
I plan my stops to include this place in my fuel schedule. When entering or leaving the desert route, it's the best place to stop and rest. It's right off the road and next to the river. It has a full shop, spotless restrooms, friendly service, a nice atmosphere, and good fuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3cDU3aGJBEAE
